budgetTracker.title: Budget tracker: keep your finances under control
budgetTracker.subtitle: Track moving costs, record income and expenses, assign categories and understand your financial situation at a glance.

sections.title: Fast entry capture
sections.body: Add income and expenses quickly, from deposit refunds to rental vans, boxes and renovation materials.
sections.detail: Open Budget from the dashboard, add a new entry and enter description, amount, type, category and date. Existing entries can be edited or removed directly from the list.

sections.title: Categories and overview
sections.body: Assign each entry to a category such as transport, material or deposits to keep your cost structure clear.
sections.detail: When creating or editing an entry, choose a predefined category or add a new one. Charts and grouped lists show where most of your money goes.

sections.title: Balance and visualisation
sections.body: Follow the current balance and use charts to spot trends before your budget gets out of hand.
sections.detail: The budget overview shows total income, expenses and balance. Visual breakdowns make it easier to adjust spending early.

contacts.title: Contact manager: all important numbers in one place
contacts.subtitle: Manage moving helpers, tradespeople, companies and authorities in a single contact hub.

sections.title: Central contact database
sections.body: Store names, phone numbers, email addresses, categories and notes for all relevant contacts.
sections.detail: Open Contacts from the dashboard, add a contact and fill in the relevant fields. Existing contacts can be edited or deleted directly.

sections.title: Address management
sections.body: Save addresses for companies, tradespeople, neighbours or anyone else involved in the move.
sections.detail: The contact form includes an address field for street, number, postcode and city, so important locations stay easy to find.

sections.title: Quick access everywhere
sections.body: Find contact details quickly on desktop or mobile instead of searching through notes.
sections.detail: Because the app is a PWA, you can use it on your phone or tablet. Search and filters help you find the right person fast.

packingList.title: Intelligent packing lists: never lose track again
packingList.subtitle: Organise boxes and items digitally with QR codes, photos, search and AI-assisted item capture.

sections.title: QR codes for every box
sections.body: Generate a unique QR code for each moving box and scan it later to see the contents instantly.
sections.detail: In Packing lists, create or edit a box and generate its QR code. Print it, attach it to the box and scan it when you need the contents.

sections.title: Photos for boxes and items
sections.body: Attach photos of packed boxes or valuable items so you can recognise them without opening everything.
sections.detail: Upload or capture photos while editing a box or item. The images appear in the detail view and help with visual identification.

sections.title: AI-assisted item capture
sections.body: Let the assistant turn text or dictated lists into structured box items with quantities and categories.
sections.detail: Open the AI packing assistant, enter a list of items or describe a box, then review the suggested items before adding them.

sections.title: Searchable lists
sections.body: Find boxes and items quickly by name, room or content.
sections.detail: Use the search field in the packing list to filter dynamically and locate the exact item or box you need.

qrCode.title: QR code system: easier box management
qrCode.subtitle: Stop guessing what is inside each box. QR codes connect physical boxes to your digital packing list.

sections.title: Unique codes for each box
sections.body: Create one QR code per box, print it and attach it visibly.
sections.detail: The QR code feature is part of the packing list. Generate a code from a box detail view and use the print or download option.

sections.title: Scan with your phone
sections.body: Use your phone camera through the app to scan the code on a box.
sections.detail: Start the scan function from the packing list or scan button, point the camera at the code and let the app identify the box automatically.

sections.title: Instant content view
sections.body: After scanning, the app opens the stored box contents, including quantities, descriptions and photos.
sections.detail: You no longer need to open every box to find one item. The scan takes you straight to the matching digital box.

ctas.label: Open packing list and QR codes

aiAssistants.title: AI assistants: intelligent support for your move
aiAssistants.subtitle: Use AI to create tasks, packing list entries and structured suggestions faster.

sections.title: Task creation from text
sections.body: Describe what needs to be done in natural language and let the assistant extract tasks, categories and priorities.
sections.detail: Open the AI assistant in the to-do module, enter notes or free text and review the suggested tasks before adding them.

sections.title: Smart packing list capture
sections.body: Enter items or describe a box and let the assistant structure items, quantities and possible box assignments.
sections.detail: The packing assistant can process comma-separated lists, dictated text or full descriptions, then prepare items for review.

sections.title: Suggestions while entering data
sections.body: The assistants can suggest sensible completions, categories or priorities based on common moving patterns.
sections.detail: For example, contract-related text can become contract tasks, while item lists can receive room or category suggestions.

transport.title: Transport planner: estimate space and costs
transport.subtitle: Calculate loading volume for furniture and boxes and estimate transport costs for the move.

sections.title: Volume calculator
sections.body: Enter furniture, boxes and quantities to estimate the total moving volume.
sections.detail: The planner turns your inventory into an approximate loading volume and recommends a suitable van or truck size.

sections.title: Cost estimation
sections.body: Combine distance, vehicle size, rental duration and helper effort to estimate transport costs.
sections.detail: Use the estimate as a planning baseline and compare offers before committing to a provider.

sections.title: Optimisation tips
sections.body: Get practical guidance for saving space and loading more efficiently.
sections.detail: The planner highlights ideas such as disassembling large furniture, using empty spaces and packing boxes consistently.

renovation.title: Renovation planner: plan material and costs
renovation.subtitle: Plan renovation tasks for old and new flats, including paint, wallpaper, flooring and other materials.

sections.title: Material calculators
sections.body: Estimate paint, wallpaper, flooring or insulation needs from room dimensions.
sections.detail: Choose the renovation type, enter room dimensions and openings, and let the app calculate required quantities.

sections.title: Room and surface management
sections.body: Define rooms and surfaces so material needs can be planned per area and for the whole project.
sections.detail: Each room can store measurements, planned work, estimated quantities and costs for more accurate preparation.

sections.title: Cost overview and shopping list
sections.body: Turn calculated material requirements into a shopping list and cost estimate.
sections.detail: After planning all rooms, export required materials and use average prices or your own assumptions for the budget.

timeline.title: Timeline: keep the move on schedule
timeline.subtitle: See tasks, milestones and important dates in chronological order.

sections.title: Automatic task timeline
sections.body: Tasks with due dates appear automatically on a clear timeline.
sections.detail: Items from your to-do lists are sorted by date, so you can see what comes next and where deadlines are close.

sections.title: Milestones and progress
sections.body: Track key moving milestones and mark completed steps.
sections.detail: Important moments such as signing contracts, handing over keys or registering an address can be tracked alongside tasks.

sections.title: Reminders and future planning
sections.body: Use the timeline to prepare upcoming or overdue tasks before they become urgent.
sections.detail: The timeline makes critical dates visible and supports future reminder workflows.

todoLists.title: Smart to-do lists: stay on top of every task
todoLists.subtitle: Manage every moving task efficiently, from cancelling contracts to handing over keys.

sections.title: Simple task management
sections.body: Create, edit, delete and complete tasks with a few clicks.
sections.detail: Open To-do lists from the dashboard, add a task and fill in description, category, priority and optional due date.

sections.title: Automatic categorisation and priority
sections.body: AI can suggest categories and priorities based on recognised wording in the task description.
sections.detail: Contract, utility, packing or authority-related phrases can be mapped to suitable categories and priorities for review.

sections.title: Templates and AI assistant
sections.body: Use common moving task templates or let the assistant turn notes into structured to-dos.
sections.detail: Choose a template or enter free text in the assistant, then review the extracted tasks before saving.

sections.title: Calendar export and reminders
sections.body: Export dated tasks to your calendar and use reminders to avoid missing deadlines.
sections.detail: Tasks with due dates can be exported as calendar events and connected to reminder workflows.
